author: Besting

author: Aurally
text: Heads-up (2026-06-06, bl-f74d main 919584c): doctor's config field-sanity is ALREADY reduced — the id_scheme.alphabet-empty / id_scheme.length-zero defect checks were removed with the id_scheme config knob. config_defect() now checks only branch.is_empty(); config_resolution() still walks a trail (your job to drop). So 'field-sanity' here is just the branch→tasks_branch rename + 'landing exists / store resolves' — no id_scheme to validate.

author: Adware
text: doctor SUBTRACTED ENTIRELY (bl-77a7 spec burn of §16; code removal bl-a38e). The base-doctor-correction HALF of this ball — replace operating/-resolves audit, config_resolution trail-drop, doctor repair-hints — plus BOTH notes above (Besting landing-seeded check, Aurally config_defect/field-sanity) are now MOOT: doctor is deleted, not corrected. Only the delivery binding-consumer half may survive (read store/landing/tasks_branch from the §7 binding, worktree_path on invocation_path) — and that likely folds into bl-f970 (Binding struct retires 'operating') / bl-9773 (prime store from cwd) / bl-567a (worktree-path helper). RESCOPE-OR-DROP pending user call.
